titleStmt.title: SII 18.92: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 92. (B.K. No. 64 of 1932-33.) HATTĪMATTŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab lying in front of the temple of Kōḍi Honnavva.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the [Chālukya]-Vikrama year 12, Prabhava, Pushya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The tithi and the week day are not given. The given details correspond to A.D. 1087, December 25, Saturday.

It registers gifts of taxes made to god Bhōgēs11vara of Martapura (i.e. Hattīmattūr). The donors of these gifts were Śivarāja, the officer in charge of the vaḍḍarāvuḷa tax, Is11vara, the pergaḍe of Daṇḍanāyaka Sōmēs11vara[bha]ṭṭa and others. The gifts were handed over to the ūroḍeya of Mārtyāpura (Hattīmattūr) and the two-hundred Mahājanas of that place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
raścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpri
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhu
dēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapa
vigaḷu . prakaṭitavaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkadadhīśvaranappa daṇda
nāyaka śivarājanuṁ patihitāgraṇi mikkaṟunūṟanāḷva
nāyakavibhu sōmanāthana mahattaranīśvaranuṁ budhā
kanenisiḻdā manneyada siṁganuvillige dharmmaśatraThe letter si is written above the line in smaller siśe.
. bhōgapuraṁdaralīlaṁ bhōgīśvaravibhu
vaḍḍarāvuḷada mahābhōgi mudadiṁde biṭṭaṁ rāThe letter da is written below the line in smaller siśe.
gave śivarājadaṇḍanāyakaratna . Eraḍaṟunūṟu
manāḷuttaraviṁdōdbhavana vaṁśadātaṁ sōmēśva
ṭṭadaṇḍanāyaka vararatnaṁ jiṣṇuvrittiyiṁdirppi
negaṁ . Ātana perggaḍe parahitanātatayaśanī
śvaraṁ guṇāgraṇi biṭṭaṁ mātēno mārtyapuravinajātaṁgabhavaṁ
ge tanna perjjuṁkamumaṁ . manneyada siṁgabhūpati
pannagahāraṁge bhaktipūrvvakavittaṁ manneyada suṁ
kamaṁ sale manneya bhūdēvaneṁdu dhare pogaḷvine
gaṁ . sannutaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ rannana besadiṁde vatsarājaṁ
biṭṭaṁ pannagakaṭakaṁgoppuva pannāyada suṁkamaṁ maThe letter ka is written below the line in smaller siśe.
nōmudadiṁda . dhareyoḷage negaḻda mārtyāpuradoḍe
yaṁ mācirudramayyanuvinmūrvvaruveyḍeReadnnū.
bēḍi paḍedarpparamaṁgī suṁkadavarggaḷoḷu varttanamaṁ .
taḷabhaṇḍadaḷake lakkakkelegaḷa kēḷonde paṇavadelevēṟiṁ
gaṁ sale vīsavondu parttiya maḷavege nālvattakoṁdu
maḷaveya lekkaṁ . Iṁtī kramadiṁ biṭṭarkkantunibharssuṁ
kadadhiparaviraḷalakṣmīkāntardhuryyateyiṁdavana
ntaguṇarmmarttapurada bhōgēśvarake . Iṁbaṟivarmmahi
mōdayaraṁbujabhavavaṁśajardhurīṇateyiṁdaṁ
(r)ttryaṁbakabhaktarbbiṭṭarnniṁbaya cavuḍayana sōva
ṇaṁ mukhyateyiṁ . svasti śrīvikramakā
lada 12 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada puṣyamāsaduttarā
yaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyoḷu biṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ kādaṁge vā
raṇāsiyoḷu sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirvvarbrāhma
ṇargge koṭṭa phaḷavī dharmmamanaḷidaṁge yā nadiyo
ḷu sāsirakavileyumaṁ sāsirbbarbrāhmaṇaruma
naḷida pātakaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
